base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of fish_man_jump_shoot — a character from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. Fish Man — leap-from-water / stand / spit-fireball 3-frame cycle. Riverbank enemy (Dead River / Belasco Marsh). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
